title: Automatically inject the @ code for the person you're replying to in a Conversation update
excerpt: When I’m replying to someone, I often forget to enter @ and then look for their name, to ensure they’re notified of the reply. It would be helpful if, when I hit reply, it automatically injects the original author’s @nam…

posts.author: bravenewniche (George Plumley)
posts.cookedHtml: When I’m replying to someone, I often forget to enter @ and then look for their name, to ensure they’re notified of the reply. It would be helpful if, when I hit reply, it automatically injects the original author’s @name.
